children.name: 1. How would you describe the pain you usually have from your hip?
children.localizedName: 1. How would you describe the pain you usually have from your hip?

localizedNames.fr-ch: 1. Comment décririez-vous la douleur que vous avez habituellement ressentie dans votre hanche?
localizedNames.en: 1. How would you describe the pain you usually have from your hip?

localizedDescriptions.en: Patient-reported extent of usual pain in hip during past 4 weeks.

annotations.comment:
Questionnaire wording: 

How would you describe the pain you usually had from your hip?

localizedDescriptions.en: The patient has experienced no pain in hip during past 4 weeks.
The patient has experienced very mild pain in hip during past 4 weeks.
The patient has experienced mild pain in hip during past 4 weeks.
The patient has experienced moderate pain in hip during past 4 weeks.
The patient has experienced severe pain in hip during past 4 weeks.

Questionnaire wording: 

Have you had any trouble with washing and drying yourself
(all over) because of your hip?

localizedDescriptions.en: The patient has no trouble washing and drying in the last 4 weeks because of pain in the hip.
The patient has little trouble washing and drying in the last 4 weeks because of pain in the hip.
The patient has moderate trouble washing and drying in the last 4 weeks because of pain in the hip.
The patient has trouble all the time washing and drying in the last 4 weeks because of pain in the hip.
The patient has extreme difficulty trouble washing and drying in the last 4 weeks because of pain in the hip.

localizedDescriptions.en: Patient-reported extent to which they are able to access vehicles due to pain in their hip.
The patient has no trouble at all getting into a vehicle during the past 4 weeks due to pain in hip.
The patient has very little trouble at all getting into a vehicle during the past 4 weeks due to pain in hip.
The patient has moderate trouble at all getting into a vehicle during the past 4 weeks due to pain in hip..
The patient has extreme difficulty at all getting into a vehicle during the past 4 weeks due to pain in hip.
The patient found it impossible to get into a vehicle during the past 4 weeks due to pain in hip.

children.localizedName: 4. Have you been able to put on a pair of socks, stockings or tights?

Questionnaire wording:
Have you been able to put on a pair of socks, stockings or tights?

localizedDescriptions.en: The patient found it easy to put on socks, stockings or tights during the past 4 weeks because of pain in the shoulder..
The patient had little difficulty putting on socks, stockings or tights during the past 4 weeks because of pain in the shoulder.
The patient had moderate difficulty putting on socks, stockings or tights during past 4 weeks because of pain in the shoulder.
The patient had extreme difficulty putting on socks, stockings or tights during past 4 weeks because of pain in the shoulder.
The patient found it impossible to put on socks, stockings or tights during past 4 weeks because of pain in the shoulder.

Questionnaire wording:
Could you do the household shopping on your own?

localizedDescriptions.en: The patient can complete household shopping easily because of hip pain all of the time during past 4 weeks.
The patient can complete household shopping with little difficulty because of hip pain all of the time during past 4 weeks.
The patient can complete household shopping with moderate difficulty because of hip pain all of the time during past 4 weeks.
The patient can complete household shopping with extreme difficulty because of hip pain all of the time during past 4 weeks.
The patient found it impossible to complete household shopping because of hip pain all of the time during past 4 weeks.

Questionnaire wording:
For how long have you been able to walk before pain from your hip becomes severe? (with or without a stick)

localizedDescriptions.en: The patient found that they could walk with no pain or more than 30 minutes before pain becomes severe during the past 4 weeks.
The patient found that they could walk 16 to 30 minutes before pain becomes severe during the past 4 weeks.
The patient found that they could walk 5 to 15 minutes before pain becomes severe during the past 4 weeks.
The patient found that they could walk around the house only before pain becomes severe during the past 4 weeks.

localizedDescriptions.en: The patient found that they can't walk without pain becoming severe during the past 4 weeks.

Questionnaire wording:

The patient found it extremely difficult to climb stairs due to hip pain during past 4 weeks.

Questionnaire wording:

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Score total des questions 1 à 12.
localizedDescriptions.en: Total score from Questions 1 to 12.

annotations.comment: The overall composite score is reached by simply summing the scores received for individual questions. This results in a continuous score ranging from 0 (most severe symptoms) to 48 (least symptoms).

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Score moyen des questions 1 à 12.
localizedDescriptions.en: Average score from Questions 1-12.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Peut indiquer une arthrose sévère de la hanche.
localizedDescriptions.en: May indicate severe hip arthritis.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Peut indiquer une arthrose de la hanche modérée à sévère.
localizedDescriptions.en: May indicate moderate to severe hip arthritis.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Peut indiquer une arthrose de la hanche légère à modérée.
localizedDescriptions.en: May indicate mild to moderate hip arthritis.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Peut indiquer une fonction articulaire satisfaisante.
localizedDescriptions.en: May indicate satisfactory joint function.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Le domaine / la sous-échelle Douleur de l’OHS comprend 6 items du questionnaire : 1, 8, 9, 10, 11 et 12.
localizedDescriptions.en: The OHS Pain domain/subscale comprises 6 questionnaire items: 1, 8, 9, 10, 11, and 12

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Le domaine / la sous-échelle Fonction de l’OHS comprend 6 items : 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 et 7.
localizedDescriptions.en: The OHS Function domain/subscale comprises 6 items: 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 and 7.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch:
Pour convertir le score brut en la métrique recommandée de 0 à 100 :
100 / score maximal possible du domaine × score réel (brut), c’est-à-dire 100 / 24 × score brut.
localizedDescriptions.en:
To convert the raw score to the recommended 0-100 metric:
100/maximum possible domain score X actual (raw) score i.e. 100/24 X raw score.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch:
Pour convertir le score brut en la métrique recommandée de 0 à 100 :
100 / score maximal possible du domaine × score réel (brut), c’est-à-dire 100 / 24 × score brut.
localizedDescriptions.en:
To convert the raw score to the recommended 0-100 metric:
100/maximum possible domain score X actual (raw) score i.e. 100/24 X raw score.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Mesure de résultat rapportée par le patient utilisée pour enregistrer la satisfaction après une arthroplastie de la hanche, y compris le soulagement perçu de la douleur, l’amélioration des activités, la satisfaction des attentes, le statut global, le score global de satisfaction et la disposition à subir à nouveau une intervention chirurgicale.
localizedDescriptions.en: A patient-reported outcome measure used to record satisfaction following hip arthroplasty, including perceived pain relief, improvement in activities, fulfilment of expectations, overall status, overall satisfaction score and willingness to undergo surgery again.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Une mesure standardisée de l’état de santé destinée à fournir un indicateur simple et générique de la santé pour les évaluations cliniques et économiques.
localizedDescriptions.en: A standardised measure of health status to provide a simple, generic measure of health for clinical and economic appraisal.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Code à cinq chiffres obtenu à partir des scores de chaque composant, où le 9 indique une valeur manquante.
localizedDescriptions.en: A 5-digit code formed from the scores of each component, with 9 indicating a missing value.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Auto-évaluation de l’état de santé global sur une échelle de 0 à 100.
localizedDescriptions.en: A self-assessment of overall health on a scale from 0 to 100.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Pour calculer un score EQ-5D-5L, il faut d’abord déterminer l’état de santé à 5 chiffres en combinant les réponses de l’individu pour chacune des cinq dimensions (Mobilité, Soins personnels, Activités habituelles, Douleur/Inconfort, Anxiété/Dépression). Chaque chiffre correspond à un niveau allant de 1 (aucun problème) à 5 (problèmes extrêmes). Ensuite, on applique l’ensemble de valeurs spécifique au pays, qui attribue un poids à chaque état de santé, et l’on soustrait la somme des pondérations de 1. Le résultat est un score d’indice unique compris entre –0,594 et 1, où 1 représente la pleine santé et les valeurs inférieures à 0 représentent des états de santé considérés comme pires que la mort.
localizedDescriptions.en: To calculate an EQ-5D-5L score, first identify the 5-digit health state bycombining the individual's responses for each of the five dimensions (Mobility, Self-care, Usual Activities, Pain/Discomfort, Anxiety/Depression), with eachdigit representing a level from 1 (no problems) to 5 (extreme problems). Then, subtract the sum of the value weights for each response from 1, using a country-specific value set that assigns a specific weight to each health state. The result is a single index score between -0.594 and 1, where 1 indicates full health and values below 0 represent states worse than death.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Soustrayez de 1 la somme des pondérations (value weights) correspondant à chaque réponse, en utilisant un ensemble de valeurs spécifique au pays qui attribue un poids à chaque état de santé. Le résultat est un score d’indice unique compris entre –0,594 et 1, où 1 indique une santé complète et les valeurs inférieures à 0 représentent des états jugés pires que la mort.
localizedDescriptions.en: Subtract the sum of the value weights for each response from 1, using a country-specific value set that assigns a specific weight to each health state. The result is a single index score between -0.594 and 1, where 1 indicates full health and values below 0 represent states worse than death.

children.name: Hip pain and stiffness VAS questionnaire (HPSQ-VAS)
children.localizedName: Hip pain and stiffness VAS questionnaire (HPSQ-VAS)

localizedNames.en: Hip pain and stiffness VAS questionnaire (HPSQ-VAS)

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Mesure de résultat rapportée par le patient utilisée pour enregistrer l’intensité de la douleur et de la raideur dans la hanche index et, le cas échéant, dans la hanche controlatérale, à l’aide d’échelles visuelles analogiques cotées de 0 à 10.
localizedDescriptions.en: A patient-reported outcome measure used to record the intensity of pain and stiffness in the index hip and, where applicable, the contralateral hip using 0–10 visual analogue scale ratings.

higher values indicate worse symptoms

children.name: Hip Disability and Osteoarthritis Outcome Score - Short Form (HOOS-12)
children.localizedName: Hip Disability and Osteoarthritis Outcome Score - Short Form (HOOS-12)

localizedNames.fr-ch: Hip Disability and Osteoarthritis Outcome Score - Short Form (HOOS-12)
localizedNames.en: Hip Disability and Osteoarthritis Outcome Score - Short Form (HOOS-12)

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Mesure des résultats rapportés par les patients (PROM) pour enregistrer le score abrégé de 12 items sur l'incapacité fonctionnelle de la hanche et l'arthrose (HOOS-12), couvrant trois domaines (douleur, fonction dans la vie quotidienne, qualité de vie). Les réponses brutes (0 à 4) sont enregistrées et transformées en scores de 0 à 100 (plus le score est élevé, mieux c'est), auxquels s'ajoute un score global de 0 à 100 (moyenne des trois domaines) reflétant l'impact sur la hanche.
localizedDescriptions.en: Patient-reported outcome measure (PROM) to record the 12-item Hip disability and Osteoarthritis Outcome Score short form (HOOS-12), covering three domains (Pain, Function in daily living, Quality of life). Raw item responses (0–4) are stored and transformed to 0–100 domain scores (higher = better), plus a 0–100 summary hip impact score (mean of the three domains).

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Question: 1. À quelle fréquence ressentez-vous des douleurs à la hanche?
localizedDescriptions.en: Question: 1. How often do you experience hip pain?

annotations.comment: Each data-field label should be short and concise; the patient-facing question is in Description.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Quelle intensité de douleur à la hanche avez-vous ressentie la semaine dernière lors des activités suivantes?
localizedDescriptions.en: What amount of hip pain have you experienced the last week during the following activities?

annotations.comment:
Have “last week” in bold font.

Explanatory note displayed between question 1 (How often do you experience hip pain?) and question 2 (Walking on a flat surface) of the questionnaire.

list.label: What amount of hip pain have you experienced the last week during the following activities?

localizedLabels.fr-ch: Quelle intensité de douleur à la hanche avez-vous ressentie la semaine dernière lors des activités suivantes?
localizedLabels.en: What amount of hip pain have you experienced the last week during the following activities?

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Question: 2. Marcher sur une surface plane
localizedDescriptions.en: Question: 2. Walking on a flat surface

annotations.comment: Each data-field label should be short and concise; the patient-facing question is in Description.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Question: 3. Monter ou descendre des escaliers
localizedDescriptions.en: Question: 3. Going up or down stairs

annotations.comment: Each data-field label should be short and concise; the patient-facing question is in Description.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Question: 4. Être assis ou allongé
localizedDescriptions.en: Question: 4. Sitting or lying

annotations.comment: Each data-field label should be short and concise; the patient-facing question is in Description.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Somme non transformée (0-16) des quatre items HOOS-12 relatifs à la douleur (chacun noté de 0 à 4 ; plus le score est élevé, plus la douleur est intense). Ne calculer que si >= 2 des 4 items ont reçu une réponse ; si 1 ou 2 items manquent, imputer chaque valeur manquante à la moyenne des items relatifs à la douleur auxquels une réponse a été donnée et signaler que l'imputation a été appliquée.
localizedDescriptions.en: Untransformed sum (0-16) of the four HOOS-12 Pain items (each scored 0-4; higher = worse). Compute only if >= 2 of 4 items are answered; if 1-2 items are missing, impute each missing value with the mean of the answered Pain items and flag that imputation was applied.

annotations.comment: This value is the basis for the transformed Pain score (0-100, higher = better).

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch:
Fonctionnement, vie quotidienne
Les questions suivantes concernent votre fonction physique, c'est-à-dire votre capacité à vous déplacer et à prendre soin de vous. Pour chacune des activités suivantes, veuillez indiquer le degré de difficulté que vous avez éprouvé au cours de la semaine dernière en raison de votre hanche.
localizedDescriptions.en:
Function, daily living
The following questions concern your physical function. By this we mean your ability to move around and to look after yourself. For each of the following activities please indicate the degree of difficulty you have experienced in the last week due to your hip.

annotations.comment:
Have “Function, daily living” in bold font.
Have “last week” in bold font.

annotations.comment: Each data-field label should be short and concise; the patient-facing question is in Description.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Somme non transformée (0-16) des quatre items de la fonction HOOS-12 (chacun noté de 0 à 4 ; plus la note est élevée, plus la situation est grave). Ne calculer que si >= 2 des 4 items ont reçu une réponse ; si 1 ou 2 items manquent, imputer chaque valeur manquante avec la moyenne des items de la fonction auxquels une réponse a été donnée et signaler que l'imputation a été appliquée.
localizedDescriptions.en: Untransformed sum (0-16) of the four HOOS-12 Function items (each scored 0-4; higher = worse). Compute only if >= 2 of 4 items are answered; if 1-2 items are missing, impute each missing value with the mean of the answered Function items and flag that imputation was applied.

annotations.comment: This value is the basis for the transformed Function score (0-100, higher = better).

localizedDescriptions.en: Question: 9. How often are you aware of your hip problem?

annotations.comment: Each data-field label should be short and concise; the patient-facing question is in Description.

localizedDescriptions.en: Question: 12. In general, how much difficulty do you have with your hip?

annotations.comment: Each data-field label should be short and concise; the patient-facing question is in Description.

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Somme non transformée (0-16) des quatre éléments HOOS-12 relatifs à la qualité de vie (chacun noté de 0 à 4 ; plus le score est élevé, plus la situation est mauvaise). Ne calculer que si >= 2 des 4 éléments ont reçu une réponse ; si 1 ou 2 éléments manquent, imputer chaque valeur manquante avec la moyenne des éléments relatifs à la qualité de vie auxquels une réponse a été donnée et signaler que l'imputation a été appliquée.
localizedDescriptions.en: Untransformed sum (0-16) of the four HOOS-12 Quality of life items (each scored 0-4; higher = worse). Compute only if >= 2 of 4 items are answered; if 1-2 items are missing, impute each missing value with the mean of the answered Quality of life items and flag that imputation was applied.

annotations.comment: This value is the basis for the transformed Quality of life score (0-100, higher = better).

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Score du domaine « Douleur » transformé linéairement sur une échelle de 0 à 100 (100 = meilleur, 0 = pire), calculé comme suit : 100 - (somme brute / 16 * 100) à partir du score brut « Douleur » (0-16).
localizedDescriptions.en: Linearly transformed Pain domain score on a 0-100 scale (100 = best, 0 = worst), calculated as 100 - (raw_sum / 16 * 100) from the Pain raw score (0-16).

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Score du domaine de la fonction transformé linéairement sur une échelle de 0 à 100 (100 = meilleur, 0 = pire), calculé comme suit : 100 - (somme brute / 16 * 100) à partir du score brut de la fonction (0-16).
localizedDescriptions.en: Linearly transformed Function domain score on a 0-100 scale (100 = best, 0 = worst), calculated as 100 - (raw_sum / 16 * 100) from the Function raw score (0-16).

localizedDescriptions.fr-ch: Score du domaine « Qualité de vie » transformé linéairement sur une échelle de 0 à 100 (100 = meilleur, 0 = pire), calculé comme suit : 100 - (somme brute / 16 * 100) à partir du score brut de la fonction (0-16).
localizedDescriptions.en: Linearly transformed Quality of life domain score on a 0-100 scale (100 = best, 0 = worst), calculated as 100 - (raw_sum / 16 * 100) from the Function raw score (0-16).
